Practical Zen for the augmented age

High-performance code.
Fully human work.

I am Roel van Bergen, a software engineer, coach, speaker, and Zen teacher. I build and explore technology that helps people work with more clarity, trust, and capability without losing craft, attention, or one another.

Enter the writing garden Explore speaking topics

Click or tap the pond to feed the koi.

Three connected paths

The engine, the inner voice, and the space between.

My work lives where engineering practice meets human attention. Software is a human system before it is a technical one, and each shapes how the other can grow.

01

Engineering

The engine

Software craftsmanship, explicit architecture, humane AI collaboration, and the engineering discipline that turns speed into dependable progress.

02

Coaching

The inner voice

Perfectionism, self-compassion, sustainable performance, and learning to work with the critic rather than beneath it.

03

Zen

The presence

Attention as a practical skill: slowing down enough to see clearly, choose deliberately, and become one with what you do.

Fresh from the garden

Bring the conversation into the room

Speaking and workshops for teams navigating speed, craft, and humanity.

I turn these ideas into practical talks and reflective sessions that help engineering teams build shared clarity, make better decisions, and work together with confidence.
